note:
{
  "experiment_overview": "The experiment involves the immunolabeling of olfactory receptor neurons in the antennae of Drosophila using whole mount techniques. The goal is to visualize and study these neurons under a microscope.",
  "procedures_observed": [
    "Antenna Dissection: A Drosophila is dissected to remove its antennae.",
    "Blocking and Staining: The antennae are treated with blocking agents and stained with fluorescent dyes.",
    "Mounting: The stained antennae are mounted on a slide for observation."
  ],

    "Blocking agents",
    "Fluorescent dyes",
    "Microscope slides"
  ],

    "Slide holder"
  ],

  ],

    "Dissection of the Drosophila",
    "Application of blocking agents and staining",
    "Mounting of the stained antennae on a slide"
  ],
  "outcomes_or_indicators": [
    "Visualization of fluorescently labeled olfactory receptor neurons under a microscope"
  ],
  "anything_unusual_or_notable": [
    "The use of whole mount immunolabeling technique, which is not commonly shown in typical lab videos."
